instruction: How is the east region doing?
response: East region generated $61,500. It's our newest territory launched in July 2024. Despite being the smallest, it shows promising 12% month-over-month growth.

instruction: What is the average order value?
response: Average order value across all products is $24,125. Enterprise Plan pulls this average up significantly due to its $40K average deal size.
Q4 2025 revenue was $2.3 million, up 15% year over year. This was the strongest quarter in company history.
Monthly revenue peaked in April 2025 at $64,000, driven by 2 Enterprise Plan renewals.

instruction: What is the onboarding completion rate?
response: 88% of customers complete onboarding successfully. Enterprise Plan has 95% completion rate. Analytics Suite has 90% completion rate. Dashboard Pro has 75% completion rate due to higher self-serve adoption.
Dashboard Pro is our entry-level product at $12K per unit. It leads in order volume with 9 orders. 40% of Dashboard Pro customers upgrade to Analytics Suite within 12 months.

instruction: Why is the south region underperforming?
response: South region had the weakest performance at $310K, down 8% from Q3. Two key accounts churned during the quarter citing integration issues with their Salesforce workflows.

instruction: What is the expansion revenue from existing customers?
response: Expansion revenue totaled $47K in Q4, representing 12% of total quarterly revenue. 60% of expansion came from Dashboard Pro to Analytics Suite upgrades. Enterprise Plan seat expansion contributed $18K of the total.
